reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, organizado. Si vas un dia de semana durante el dia, suele haber fila, pero ya de noche, no hay casi nadie. Y en los findes tmb suele haber poca gente. Atención normal.

(Translated by Google)
Good place, well-organized. If you go on a weekday during the day, there's usually a line, but at night, it's practically empty. Weekends are also usually quiet. Service is average.
